name: Broccoli"castlerole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the 10 White Castle hamburgers side by side in a large casserole dish.
2. Cook and drain the 4 packages of frozen broccoli, then layer over the hamburgers.
3. Melt the Velveeta cheese and pour it evenly over the broccoli and hamburgers.
4. Crush 1 stack of Ritz crackers with 1/2 stick of butter.
5. Sprinkle the crushed cracker mixture evenly over the top of the casserole.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the topping starts to brown.
